ddls:
CREATE TABLE "businesses" (
  "business_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business */,
  "naics_code" TEXT /* NAICS code representing the industry sector */,
  "business_name" TEXT /* Name of the business */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the business */,
  "category" TEXT /* Broad category of the business */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the business */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the business was established */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the business */,
  "industry_sector" TEXT /* Sector of the economy to which the business belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_businesses_naics_code FOREIGN KEY ("naics_code") REFERENCES naics_codes ("naics_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_businesses_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES industry_categories ("category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue report */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the business to which the report belongs */,
  "total_operating_revenue" REAL /* Total operating revenue for the business */,
  "report_year" INTEGER /* Year in which the report was generated */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter in which the report was generated */,
  "revenue_growth_rate" REAL /* Revenue growth rate compared to the previous year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_reports_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_statistics" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment statistic entry */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the business to which the employment statistic belongs */,
  "employer_firms" INTEGER /* Number of employer firms in the industry */,
  "total_employment" INTEGER /* Total number of employees reported */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the employment data */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average salary of employees */,
  "employment_growth_rate" REAL /* Employment growth rate compared to the previous year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_statistics_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Recycling, Publishing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category" INTEGER /* Parent category to which this category belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "naics_codes" (
  "naics_code" TEXT /* NAICS code representing an industry */,
  "industry_description" TEXT /* Description of the industry associated with the NAICS code */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the economy to which the code belongs */,
  "sub_sector" TEXT /* Sub-sector to which the code belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("naics_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization to which the user belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., updated report, viewed data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the business for which the trend is recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., revenue, employment) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric for the given year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the metric was measured */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the metric compared to the previous year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., revenue, employment) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_type FOREIGN KEY ("data_type") REFERENCES employment_statistics ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_type FOREIGN KEY ("data_type") REFERENCES revenue_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image of the visualization */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_title FOREIGN KEY ("title") REFERENCES reports ("title")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the dashboard was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
